added: Smart analyze prefetch - pasted or typed secure links now start a quiet debounced background analyze
Playlist file format analysis - playlist items can now lazy-load file-specific formats from Edit
fixed: Duplicate YouTube format rows - same-spec format choices are collapsed before the picker renders them
Audio-only carryover - a previous audio analysis no longer makes the next video or playlist default to audio-only unexpectedly
Sparse platform formats - parser fallback now accepts requested formats, requested downloads, and root-level metadata
Post-processing feedback - queue items now surface extract, merge, metadata, thumbnail, and container-finalizing stages
Localization lint - transient playlist-analysis helper labels are marked non-translatable
improved: Browse analyze speed and routing - YouTube analysis now prefers saved access/session hints and reuses recent info-json snapshots where safe
Playlist format architecture - large playlists now stay light at first and only deepen format data when the user asks
Thumbnail post-processing - embedded or written thumbnails are converted to JPG to reduce WebP-related post-processing failures
